name: CF identifier secrets were never propagated after BUG-721 placeholdering - deploys broke; formalize Doppler canonical storage + sync
description: BUG-721 / FCR-2026-05-23-L14.F7+F8 placeholdered CF account_id and the 6 KV namespace ids out of apps/api/wrangler.toml (commits 3e1141958, 3580bebd6, ~May 30) with the instruction to add the values to Doppler and propagate to GitHub Actions secrets - but the propagation never happened. Every deploy.yml run failed at 'Render Cloudflare identifiers into wrangler.toml' (9+ consecutive failures observed 2026-06-11) until the shepherd of the identity-foundation execution recovered the 7 values from git history (pre-placeholder wrangler.toml) and set them as GitHub Actions repo secrets directly (2026-06-11, unblocking the WI-585 staging reseed deploy). REMAINING WORK: (1) add the 7 values to Doppler (project mentomate) per the intended design ('Doppler-managed, exposed to GitHub Actions') and confirm/wire the Doppler->GitHub sync covers them, so GitHub is not the only home; (2) note the values are still recoverable from git history, partially defeating the placeholder security goal - decide whether history purge or value rotation is warranted; (3) consider a CI guard that fails PRs introducing new placeholder vars without the matching secret existing.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: BUG-721 placeholdered the Cloudflare account/KV identifiers out of wrangler.toml, but the intended Doppler-to-GitHub propagation never happened; deploy.yml then failed at the render step until the values were recovered from git history and set directly in GitHub. Variants to cover: (a) all 7 CF identifiers have Doppler as canonical storage and are synced to GitHub Actions, (b) deploy.yml render plus deploy succeeds from that path alone, (c) history-exposure decision is recorded as rotate vs accept, (d) future placeholder vars without backing secrets are caught by a pre-merge check or documented runbook. Regression coverage: add/update a CI or script check that fails when deploy-required wrangler placeholders have no backing secret, with a negative fixture/path; verify the successful deploy.yml path or equivalent render/secret-completeness check.
